summary: Kanban board feature testing completed successfully. Both Admin and Employee ticket pages now display tickets in a 4-column Kanban board layout (Open, In Progress, Waiting on User, Resolved). All requested features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: TicketCard and EmployeeTicketCard components properly extracted outside main components to fix lint errors
Kanban columns correctly filter out CLOSED tickets
Drag-and-drop handlers properly implemented for admin status changes
Employee drag-drop is visual only (cannot change status) - correct behavior
data-testid attributes properly added for all interactive elements
Status change via dropdown updates ticket and refreshes board correctly
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Kanban Test Ticket during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban board feature fully implemented and tested. Features verified: 1) Admin Kanban with 4 columns (Open/yellow, In Progress/blue, Waiting on User/purple, Resolved/green), 2) Ticket cards show category icon, ticket#, priority dot, subject, assigned name, time, comment count, 3) Admin can change status via detail panel dropdown - ticket moves to correct column, 4) Employee Kanban shows same 4 columns with 'Needs Your Response' label for WAITING_ON_USER, 5) Employee tickets show 'Reply needed' badge for WAITING_ON_USER status, 6) Employee can create new tickets, 7) CLOSED tickets filtered out from Kanban view.

admin_kanban_board.details: 4 columns displayed correctly with proper colors and counts

admin_ticket_cards.details: Cards show category icon, ticket#, priority dot, subject, assigned name, time

admin_status_change_dropdown.details: Status dropdown in detail panel updates ticket and moves to correct column

admin_ticket_detail_panel.details: Panel shows all ticket info, status/priority dropdowns, assign dropdown, comments

employee_kanban_board.details: 4 columns with 'Needs Your Response' label for WAITING_ON_USER

employee_create_ticket.details: New ticket modal with category, subject, description, priority, attachments

employee_reply_needed_badge.details: 'Reply needed' badge appears on tickets with WAITING_ON_USER status

employee_ticket_detail.details: Detail panel shows ticket info, status badges, conversation, reply input
